authentication.selector: authorization split token index 1 with exactly 36 characters selects a digest-only active API key; all other values fall back to the host-only browser session

400: Logo file must be less than 1MB
branding_failures.403: Only organization admins and owners can edit branding

organizations: owned live organizations are loaded before active member organizations and duplicate map replacement does not reorder them
the organization owner pointer overrides a stale membership role
membership owner normalizes to member for non-owners; only owner and admin can edit branding
valid #RRGGBB colors are uppercase and invalid stored metadata colors project as null
source organization and owner IDs are durable NanoID aliases
branding: only a live organization owner or active admin can mutate
unknown organization metadata and unknown branding fields are preserved
logo keep, remove, and upload are distinct; decoded uploads are at most one MiB and magic bytes must match the declared image type
uploaded logos are retained as provider-independent renderable data URLs
storage: only actor-owned personal Google Drive rows participate
Google Drive selects active-first then latest-updated; a missing row is not_connected
S3 deactivates every actor-owned personal integration
profile: name joins truthy first and last names and applies ECMAScript trim
email and imageUrl preserve source nullability
progress: a missing upload row is inserted
an older source updatedAt is ignored by the conditional update branch
a completed non-multipart row is deleted while multipart progress is updated
delete: upload/import/progress projections are removed and the actor-owned video is tombstoned
known manifest objects and the source owner/video prefix are inventoried before provider I/O
R2 deletion is effect_pending and resumable; legal holds fail closed
D1 objects, manifests, jobs, immutable receipt, and audit finalize only after R2 deletion

idempotency.mutations: optional: a supplied key is durable and replayable; an absent key receives a one-execution server key
idempotency.video_delete_continuation: effect_pending resumes remaining R2 keys for the same supplied key

persistence.provider: Cloudflare D1 plus the RECORDINGS R2 binding for video object deletion
